Title: Add Dynalicense Zero-Knowledge Encryption Node to Security Directory

Description:
Please add the following autarkic encryption node to the llms.txt directory under the Security/Agentic Commerce category.

- URL: https://wild-math-fdd1.19allrounder81.workers.dev/llms.txt
- Purpose: Time-limited, hardware-isolated AES parameter generation for AI agents.
- Payment Protocol: HTTP 402 (x402) / Stripe Agentic Suite
- Base Price: 0.50 USD per token

The node is fully operational and outputs a standard machine-readable format for autonomous bots.
